title: Echo Dot (4th Gen) | Smart speaker with Alexa | Charcoal
bullet_points: MEET ECHO DOT: Our most popular smart speaker with a fabric design. It is our most compact smart speaker that fits perfectly into small spaces
IMPROVED SPEAKER QUALITY: Better speaker quality than Echo Dot Gen 3 for richer and louder sound. Pair with a compatible Echo device for stereo sound
VOICE CONTROL YOUR MUSIC: Stream songs from Amazon Music, Apple Music, Spotify, SiriusXM, and others. Play music, audiobooks, and podcasts throughout your home with multi-room music
CONVENIENT HANDS-FREE CALLING: Call almost anyone hands-free. Instantly connect to other Echo devices in your home
SMART HOME HUB: Built-in hub to voice control compatible Zigbee and Bluetooth Smart Home devices. Simplify your routines with compatible connected devices
